user.title: Set up UbiBot
user.description: Enter your channel ID and an API key. You can use either an Account Key or a channel Read Key – the type is detected automatically. The update interval can be changed later under the integration's options.

reauth_confirm.title: UbiBot – update credentials
reauth_confirm.description: The key for channel {channel} is no longer valid or has expired. Please enter a new key (Account or Read Key).

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed – check the channel ID and key.
